description: Legal document. Bill of divorce, Fusṭāṭ. This bill of divorce is one of forty under the T-S 10J2 shelfmark. The fragment is torn and thus is missing portions of the document. What remains indicates that the divorce is between Natan ha-Kohen and Sitt al-Khawāt bt. [. . .]. The date that is left is for the 28 of a month between 1449 and 1460 in the Seleucid calendar (1138-1149 in Julian). (Information from Goitein's index card)
